info.title: Protogen FR | Public API
info.description: End-user REST API for the Protogen FR media platform. All endpoints are relative to the base URL `https://v2.protogen.fr/api`. Authentication can be done via the `PROTOGEN_SESSION` cookie or the `X-Api-Key` request header (raw token). Endpoints that require authentication return `401` when credentials are missing or invalid.

cookieAuth.name: PROTOGEN_SESSION
cookieAuth.description: Session cookie issued after a successful login.

apiKeyHeader.name: X-Api-Key
apiKeyHeader.description: Raw session token passed as a request header. Alternative to the PROTOGEN_SESSION cookie.

MediaItem.description: Extended video item with stream URL (used for music and owner listings)

still_url.description: Full TMDB episode still image URL (w300)

videoCount.description: Number of videos in the playlist

tags.name: Media
tags.description: Videos: browse, metadata, likes, watch later

tags.name: Admin
tags.description: Admin-only management endpoints. Requires elevated (admin) session.

tags.name: Admin Kikiskothek
tags.description: Kikiskothek calendar management. Requires admin or DJ role.

post.description: Authenticate with username/email and password. Sets the `PROTOGEN_SESSION` cookie on success.

identifier.description: Username (with or without leading @) or e-mail address

redirect.description: Redirect URL after login; `/onboard/{token}` for non-onboarded users, `/` otherwise

post.summary: Validate credentials without creating a session
post.description: Used by the multi-account switcher to verify credentials before adding them. Does not set a cookie.

get.summary: Get total view count for a video

post.description: Works for both anonymous and logged-in users. Use `click` when the video starts and `loop` on each replay.
Pass already-loaded IDs to avoid duplicates.

get.summary: Check whether the current user has liked a video
get.description: Returns `authenticated: false` and `liked: false` for unauthenticated users instead of 401.

get.summary: Get all videos liked by the current user

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: Must match the authenticated user's ID.

parameters.name: user_id

get.description: Only returns results when the video has `download = 1` in its tags.

403.description: Download not allowed for this video

get.description: Returns videos that have at least one music-related tag (music, musique, musiques, song, songs, chanson, chansons, clip, clips). Visibility respects the caller's login state.

get.summary: Get preview/clip URL for a video
List videos uploaded by a channel

get.description: Returns `is_subscribed: false` for unauthenticated users without a 401.

parent_id.description: Set to reply to another comment

get.description: Without `owner`, returns public playlists. Owners get their private/unlisted playlists too when authenticated.

get.summary: Get a playlist with its videos

parameters.name: unread_only
parameters.description: Pass `true` to return only unread notifications

get.description: Returns 0 for unauthenticated users without a 401.

post.summary: Mark one or all notifications as read

mark_all.description: Set to `true` to mark all as read.

get.summary: Poll encoding progress for a video

200.description: Raw encoder API status response (JSON passthrough)

get.summary: Get Kikiskothek calendar entries for a month

isAdmin.description: Whether the current user is an admin (admins/DJs see hidden entries)

get.summary: Get all completed episodes for a series (flat list)

get.summary: Get chapter/breakpoint timestamps for an episode

post.summary: Save or retrieve series watch progress
post.description:
Multipurpose series progress endpoint. Use the `action` field to select behaviour.

- **save** – save current playback position
- **get** – retrieve progress for a specific episode (or the last-watched episode for resume)
- **get_all** – retrieve all progress entries for a series
- **mark_completed** – mark a specific episode as fully watched

completed.description: True when episode was watched past 90%

get.description: Returns a paginated list of non-hidden movies from the local library.
Returns a paginated list of non-hidden series from the local library.

get.summary: Get a single movie by ID
Get a series with its seasons

404.description: Season or parent series not found

get.description: Full-text search against the local movies table (title / original_title). Not a TMDB proxy.
Full-text search against the local series table (title / original_title). Not a TMDB proxy.
Proxy to TMDB search. Requires authentication.

post.summary: Submit a movie or series proposal

tmdb_id.description: TMDB identifier obtained from searchMovies or searchSeries

get.description: Returns all seasons with their episode counts, including the special 'Autre' season (id 0).
Fetch a season by its database ID or its season number. Pass `id=0` or `number=0` to get the special 'Autre' season.

get.summary: Get episodes for a Kikiskothek season
get.description: Returns the season metadata and all its episodes with video details. Use `season_id=0` or `season_number=0` for the 'Autre' season.

get.summary: Look up a video's Kikiskothek episode info
get.description: Given a video ID, returns the Kikiskothek episode and season it belongs to, or 404 if it is not a Kikiskothek episode.
Full-text search across episode titles and video descriptions. Minimum 2 characters.

post.description: Pin a video to the featured list at an optional position. Requires admin.
Create a season linked to the local series and a TMDB season. Requires admin.
Permanently delete a movie or series record. Requires admin.
Delete a movie-series season by its ID. Requires admin.
Permanently delete a user account. Requires admin.
Permanently delete a video and its associated data. Requires admin.
Submit a remote URL for encoding as an episode's video. Requires admin.
Submit a remote URL for encoding as a movie's video. Requires admin.
Create a new onboarding invite token for an already-registered user. Requires admin.

get.description: Retrieve engagement analytics (views, likes) broken down by year. Requires admin.
Return encoder status for a series episode. Requires admin.
Return upload counts per month for a given year. Requires admin.
Return encoder status for a movie video. Requires admin.
Return all episodes for a season including their encoder status. Requires admin.

post.description: Return series metadata and its seasons. Requires admin.
Fetch TMDB metadata and create a local movie or series record. Optionally link an existing video. Requires admin.

post.description: Create an account and generate an onboarding invite link. Requires admin.
Unpin a video from the featured list. Requires admin.
Update the display order of all featured videos. Requires admin.
Search The Movie Database for movies or series. Requires admin.
Grant or revoke admin (elevated) status for a user. Requires admin. Cannot revoke own status.
Grant or revoke DJ role for a user. Requires admin.
Hide or show a movie or series in public listings. Requires admin.
Apply or reset a custom CSS color theme site-wide. Requires admin.
Set intro/outro timestamps for a series episode. Accessible by admin or DJ.
Upload a new site logo (PNG, JPG, SVG, WEBP; max 2 MB). Requires admin.

post.description: Update, reset, force or un-force the site-wide Tailwind color theme. Requires admin.
Set the site Tailwind theme color via JSON body. Requires admin.

color.description: Tailwind color name (e.g. slate, blue, rose)

post.description: Upload a video file for a series episode and submit it to the encoder. Requires admin.
Upload a video file for a movie and submit it to the encoder. Requires admin.

Create a new season (year) for the Kikiskothek calendar. Requires admin or DJ.

Update episode number and/or title for a Kikiskothek episode. Requires admin or DJ.
Update season metadata (number, title, description, or thumbnail). Requires admin or DJ.
Authenticates a user and returns a raw API token. Does not set cookies or handle onboarding redirects. Useful for headless / mobile clients.

identifier.description: Username or email. Leading @ is stripped.

token.description: Bearer token to use as X-Api-Key header

get.summary: Generate QR code for current session
get.description: Returns the caller's session token encoded as a QR code PNG image. Intended for companion-app scanning.

200.description: PNG image of the QR code

get.description: Returns public account information for a user identified by username, email, or user ID.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: Username, email, or numeric user ID

get.description: Returns the URL of a user's profile picture. Falls back to the default image if none is set.
Returns all completed (encoded) videos and shorts owned by the authenticated user. Used for the cinema media picker.
Returns all seasons for a series. The authenticated user must be the series owner.
Returns all episodes for a season. The authenticated user must be the series owner.

post.description: Updates title, description, tags, visibility, audience, download flag and other metadata for a video. The caller must own the video.
Uploads a custom thumbnail for a video. Accepts JPG, PNG, or WebP up to 5 MB. The caller must own the video.

400.description: Bad request (missing file, wrong type, too large)

get.description: Streams a video file as a download attachment. The video must have `download` enabled. Quality must be one of the encoded variants.

403.description: Download not allowed for this video

404.description: Video or quality variant not found

get.summary: Check if a channel is live
Get own profile picture and banner
get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile picture and banner URLs, along with basic identity fields.

200.description: Array of playlists with video counts

404.description: Channel not found or no shorts

get.description: Returns the video list for an owner. If the caller is the owner, all visibility levels are returned; otherwise only public videos.

200.description: Array of video objects with a `views` field

get.description: Returns the shorts list for an owner. Visibility filtering follows the same rules as mediasFromOwner.

200.description: Array of short objects with a `views` field

post.description: Updates the authenticated user's channel display name, bio, contact info and social links.

message.example: Informations mises à jour avec succès

post.description: Uploads a new profile picture or banner for the authenticated user's channel. Accepts JPG, PNG, and WebP.

type.description: Can also be passed as a query parameter

path.description: Relative path to the saved file

get.description: Returns all cinema sessions belonging to the authenticated user. Proxied from the encoder API; the `id` field is aliased to `sessionId` for frontend compatibility.

post.description: Reorders the upcoming queue items (excluding the currently playing item). Proxied from the encoder API.

order.description: Array of integers mapping new positions to original queue indices

post.description: Called by the encoder after a video or short finishes encoding. Sends notifications to all channel subscribers. Authenticates via raw bearer token in body or `X-Token` header (not the cookie).

400.description: Missing video_id, token, or invalid type

patch.description: Updates the position of all videos in a playlist in one batch. The caller must own the playlist.

order.description: Array of objects mapping video_id to new position

get.description: Full-text search of public playlists by title.

post.description: Permanently deletes a video and all associated data (tags, likes, watch-later entries, playlist items, comments, featured entries). The caller must own the video.
Updates video metadata via multipart/form-data. Used by the Studio editor. Optionally accepts a new thumbnail file.

thumbnail.description: URL to new thumbnail (only present when uploaded)

400.description: Missing video_id or title, or invalid thumbnail

get.description: Returns paginated list of all community posts with optional search filter. Requires admin.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Optional search string to filter posts by content or author

get.summary: Get replies for a community post (admin)
get.description: Returns all replies for a given post ID. Requires admin.

post.description: Permanently deletes a community post and all its replies. Requires admin.
Permanently deletes a community reply. Requires admin.
Updates the text content of a community post. Maximum 2000 characters. Requires admin.

content.description: New text content for the post

400.description: Missing fields or content too long

post.summary: Remove an image from a community post (admin)
post.description: Removes a specific image (by 0-based index) from a community post's image array. Requires admin.

index.description: 0-based index of the image to remove

post.description: Creates a new community post with optional images (max 4, total max 45 MB). Requires authentication.

images.description: Optional images (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP; max 4 files, total max 45 MB)

400.description: Missing content, content too long, too many images, or total image size exceeded

post.description: Creates a reply on a community post. Maximum 1000 characters. Requires authentication.

400.description: Missing fields or content too long

post.description: Deletes a reply. Users can delete their own replies; admins can delete any reply. Requires authentication.

403.description: Not the reply owner and not admin

get.summary: Get a single community post with replies
get.description: Returns a community post by ID along with a paginated list of its replies. Authentication is optional but enables like status.

parameters.name: replies_offset
parameters.description: Number of replies to skip (for pagination)

get.description: Returns a paginated list of community posts, newest first. Authentication is optional but enables like statuses.

get.summary: Get replies for a community post
get.description: Returns paginated replies for a community post.

post.summary: Toggle like on a community post
post.description: Toggles the current user's like on a community post. Returns the updated like state. Requires authentication.

200.description: Like toggled — returns new like state

post.description: Submits an export job to the encoder with the provided timeline clips. Returns a job ID for polling. Requires authentication.

totalDuration.description: Total duration of the exported video in seconds

400.description: No clips provided or invalid data

get.description: Polls the encoder for the status of an export job. Requires authentication.

get.summary: Get video details for the editor
get.description: Returns video metadata and stream URL for use in the video editor. Only the video owner can access. Requires authentication.

post.description: Saves timeline clips, effects, and transitions for the current user's project. Requires authentication.

get.description: Returns metadata for a random short-format video. Optionally excludes specific video IDs. Public endpoint, no authentication required.

parameters.name: exclude_ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of video IDs to exclude from the random selection

200.description: Random short video or empty result

video.description: Video metadata object, or absent when none available

message.description: Present when no shorts are available

get.description: Serves a payload of random bytes for client-side bandwidth estimation. No authentication required. Returns `application/octet-stream`.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Requested payload size in kilobytes (clamped to 50–4096 KB)

X-Probe-Size-KB.description: Actual payload size served in KB

post.description: Approves a user-submitted movie or series proposal. Optionally attaches an admin note. Requires admin. Disabled in read-only mode.

note.description: Optional admin note to attach to the approval

post.description: Rejects a user-submitted movie or series proposal. Optionally attaches an admin note. Requires admin.

note.description: Optional admin note to attach to the rejection

get.summary: Get rendered HTML for a short video player
get.description: Returns the full server-rendered HTML fragment for a short video player, including the video element, overlay UI, channel info, and action buttons. Used by the shorts page to load successive shorts dynamically.

200.description: HTML fragment for the short video player

delete.summary: Remove a like/dislike from a comment
delete.description: Removes the current user's like or dislike reaction from a comment. Comment ID can be passed as a query parameter or in the JSON request body. Requires authentication.

parameters.name: comment_id
parameters.description: ID of the comment (alternative to request body)

400.description: Missing comment_id or unable to remove like
